review_title: Even as a small client, Yonyx showed up big!
description: My experience with Yonyx has been top tier. At first, it felt confusing and overwhelming since I’m not a software engineer and didn’t understand how the system worked. After playing around for about an hour, I realized it was better to schedule a demo and prep my wireframe. It turned out to be pretty simple... especially comparing my Yonyx flow to how mega companies are currently using it. What stood out most was the support. Even with an entry-level subscription, I received enterprise-level help. I couldn’t have done it without [sensitive content hidden] patience and [sensitive content hidden]help from time to time. As a small business owner wearing many hats, I got busy after initial implementation. My VAs started working directly with [sensitive content hidden], and even when I missed the Zoom call, he and [sensitive content hidden] jumped in and solved everything — including moving us from Google Sheets API to Airtable API. In short, I’m a small customer making lots of outbound calls, but I was treated like a big one. The support was always fast — not in days or hours, but minutes. I knew if my team ran into an issue, [sensitive content hidden] would be there.
author: Jordan G.
pros: The product itself is fantastic solution for my call team. Support staff [sensitive content hidden] went above and beyond to ensure our success at every level.
cons: There is a slight learning curve involved with Yonyx, but their hands on support team makes up for that.
